__prompts__.welcome_message:
------------------------
	Welcome to Raptor! 🚀
	Values shown in brackets are the default options.
	Set organisation_name, project_name and package_feed for Devops: https://pkgs.dev.azure.com/ORGANISATION_NAME/PROJECT_NAME/_packaging/PACKAGE_FEED/pypi/simple/ or 
	project_name for Github (PyPi): https://pypi.org/p/PROJECT_NAME
__prompts__.additional_prompts: Are you using Azure DevOps or Github?
